zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Stuteville於大約1192年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾利德斯達爾時，他的父親Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel48歲，母親Gunnora de Albini Brito16歲。他於1209年之後與Dervorguilla Galloway在英國波藍德結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1233年10月19日之前在英國越可爾，埋葬在英國越可爾馬利可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas de Stuteville于大约1192年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾利德斯達爾时，他的父亲Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel48岁，母亲Gunnora de Albini Brito16岁。他于1209年之后与Dervorguilla Galloway在英国波藍德结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1233年10月19日之前在英国越可爾，埋葬在英国越可爾馬利可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Stuteville was born about 1192, in Liddesdale, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel, was 48 and his mother, Gunnora de Albini Brito, was 16. He married Dervorguilla Galloway after 1209, in Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died before 19 October 1233, in Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Marrick, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de Stuteville est né environ 1192, à Liddesdale, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Gunnora de Albini Brito, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Dervorguilla Galloway après 1209, à Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 19 octobre 1233, à Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Marrick, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de Stuteville um 1192 in Liddesdale, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel 48 und seine Mutter Gunnora de Albini Brito 16. Er hat nach 1209 in Cumberland, England Dervorguilla Galloway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 19. Oktober 1233 in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Marrick, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Stuteville è nato il circa 1192 nel Liddesdale, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Gunnora de Albini Brito, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Dervorguilla Galloway dopo il 1209, nel Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì prima del 19 ottobre 1233, nel Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolto a Marrick, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Stutevilleが約1192年にスコットランドアルグイルリッドエスダルで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddelは48歳，母Gunnora de Albini Britoは16歳であった。1209年以後にイギリスクウンバーランドでDervorguilla Gallowayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1233年10月19日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアマリックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Stuteville(이)가 대략 1192년 스컷랜드 아그이 리데즈데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Gunnora de Albini Brito(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1209년 이후 영국 쿠벌랜드에서 Dervorguilla Galloway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1233년 10월 19일 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 마릭에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1192–before 19 October 1233: ойролцоогоор 1192 он–1233 оны Аравдугаар сарын 19–наас өмнө
mn.East Riding, Yorkshire, England: Cleveland, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Stuteville nasceu aproximadamente 1192, em Liddesdale, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Gunnora de Albini Brito, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Dervorguilla Galloway após 1209, em Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 19 de outubro de 1233, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Marrick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Stuteville родился около 1192 г. в местности лиддесдеил, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Gunnora de Albini Brito, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Dervorguilla Galloway после 1209 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер перед 19 октябрь 1233 г. в местности еркшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности маррикк, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas de Stuteville nació aproximadamente 1192, en Liddesdale, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Gunnora de Albini Brito, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Dervorguilla Galloway después de 1209, en Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió antes de 19 de octubre de 1233, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Marrick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
